programmes.show_description: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.
Renard orders executions, but Stuckler trades Philippe for his family. Nicole claims pregnancy to delay her fate. The Maquis attack German planes; Lewis surrenders to let the others escape.
When prominent MPs are invited to discuss the recession, Henry hits meltdown as personal angst overcomes professional etiquette and the subject hits more than a chord.
Henry's ex-wife tells him she's re-marrying - why not to him, he wants to know. Meanwhile, Damien reckons he's on his way to a gambling fortune.

Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
Flash and Zarkov escape the Rock men, but soon find themselves helping in the search for the Rock King's missing son.

When Winston watches Manchester City train, Bloody Delilah is flooded with complaints about missed bin collections. The gang, thinking hes lonely, hatches a plan to cheer him up.
Jane copes with a flood of problem letters and calls. Val cites her horoscope and plans a money-making scheme: a blue movie with Vincent Fish.
Old stories resurface and threaten the future of the paper.
The team face a deadly challenge from trained assassins when they are assigned to protect a deposed Latin American dictator currently in exile in the south of France.

Emily and Luc return to Le Crest as Liz arrives. Tension rises over missing allies and loyalty shifts. In London, Faith seeks support but now German assault begins before help can come,growing strain.

Newspaper reports suggest Sally isn't the most able, attractive, popular and least boring member of the Globelink team. She decides to sue.
Cult Director Russ Meyer directs erotic classic Fanny Hill. In pre-Victorian London, young Fanny enters an elite brothel in this surreal mix of slapstick, satire, and sensuality.
A tribute to Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970's - Mary Millington. This unique documentary uses film from all aspects of her life, from intimate interviews to adult modelling.

programmes.show_name: A Day In The Life Of Beryl Cook
programmes.show_description: A look into the world of Beryl Cook, one of Britain's most popular painters-an irreverent grandmother known for bold art featuring royal fantasies and cheeky scenes like a 'female flasher'.

Based on Jilly Coopers bestseller, lust and rivalry surround British equestrians. Superbly adapted for the small screen, it lifts the veil on show jumping with romance, adventure and indulgence.
Mary Millington is Queen of the Blues - Mayfair's most famous stripper. She must use her pleasing assets to defuse the ongoing criminal activity, surrounding the nightclub she performs in.
